upasargachandrika.example_text: 'paSavo vE pUzA ta etasya prasave prerate' (Sa॰brA॰9.2.3.12) prasavo'ByanujYAnam aByanujYAtAH santaH pracarantItyarTaH
'yasya te viSvA BuvanAni ketunA pra cerate ni ca viSante aktuBiH' (f॰10.37.9) ketunA ca prerate gatimanti Bavanti pracaranti saYcarantItyarTaH niviSante=uparamanti niScalAni Bavanti
'tvayyudite prerate citraBAno' (aTarva॰4.25\3) prerate sve sve karmaRi pravartante
'kimuddiSya kASyapena matsakASamfzayaH preritAH syuH' (SA॰4) preritAH visfzwAH
'AtmAnamapi ca krudDaH prerayed yamasAdanam' (BA॰vana॰29.6) anantarodita evArTaH
'pra viprARAM matayo vAca Irate' (f0 9857) vAcaH stutIH prerate prerayantItyarTaH
'tAvimO SokasantApO SanEH preraya BAmini' (rA0 4219) preraya apanaya apanuda vigamaya
'te hocurdevAH mlAno'yaM pitA mayoBUH punarimaM samIryotTApayAmeti' (go॰brA॰u॰4.12) samIrya=vIjayitvA
'sa EkzvAko'DAvayat brAhmaRakumAraM raTena vyacCinat… tametena sAmnA samErayat' (paYca0 brA0 13312) samErayat saNgatAvayavamakarot
'kaSyapastvAmasfjata kaSyapastvA samErayat' (aTarva0 8514) tvAM maRim uktapUrva evArTaH
'yAnevEzAM tasminsaMgrAme'GnaMstAn pitfyajYena samErayanta' (Sa0 brA0 2611) samErayanta samajIvayan
'kUpopakaRWe viSrAnto brAhmaRastayA samprerya kUpAntaH pAtitaH' (paYcata0) samprerya=praRudya
'tatastasmindvijaSrezWa samudIrRe taTAviDe' (BA0 Adi0 321) samudIrRe devAnIke saNgrAmAyodgate

'udaDAviva sarvasinDavaH samudIrRAstvayi nATa dfzwayaH na ca tAsu BavAn pradfSyate praviBaktAsu saritsvivodaDiH' (syAdvAda0 30 ityatra hEmodDftaM sidDasenadivAkaravacanam) samudIrRAH saNgatAH ucCabdastvasTAne
'divodAsAya navatiM ca navendraH puro vyErayacCambarasya' (f0 2196) vyErayat vyagamayat vyaDvaMsadityarTaH
'treDA sahasraM vi tadErayeTAm' (tE0 saM0 71627) tad gavAM sahasraM viBaktavantO viBajya vyavasTApitavantO prAptavantO
'dyumnavad brahma kuSikAsa erira eka eko dame agniM samIDire' (f0 32915) erire=A Irire udIrayAmAsurityarTaH
'utAdaH paruze gavi sUraScakraM hiraRyayaM nyErayadraTItamaH' (f0 6563) nyErayat prErayat prARudat
'ye tve kAmaM nyerire' (f0 81918) nyerire nitarAM prerayanti
'yaM devA dUtamaratiM nyerire' (f0 81921) nyerire prerayanti prasTApayanti visfjanti
'udagne Sucayastava SukrA BrAjanta Irate' (f0 84417) udIrate uccaranti
'udasya ketavo divi SukrA BrAjanta Irate' (aTarva0 1321) udIrate utpatanti
'udIratAmavara ut parAsa unmaDyamAH pitaraH somyAsaH' (f0 10151) ukto'rTaH
'udIrayetAM brAhmARi divyAnyastrARyanekaSaH' (BA0 droRa0 19231) udIrayetAm prAkzipetAm AqaBAvaSCAndasaH CandovatkavayaH kurvanti
'brahma kzatreRa saMsfzwaM kzatraM ca brahmaRA saha udIrRe dahataH SatrUn vanAnIvAgnimAruto' (BA0 vana0 2610) udIrRe pravfdDe
'sa hi devErudIrRasya rAvaRasya vaDArTiBiH' (rA0 217) udIrRasya dfptasya
'agnirvA ito vfzwimudIrayati' (tE0 saM0 24102) udIrayati UrDvaM gamayati (AhutiBiH) vfzwimudakam
'loBAt kroDaH praBavati paradozErudIryate' (BA0 SAM0 1637) udIryata uddIpyate
'sarvaM tu duHKaM mama lakzmaRedaM SAntaM SarIre vanametya SUnyam sItAviyogAtpunarapyudIrRam' (rA0 3636).. udIrRamutTitam
'samutpapAtATa sadasyudIrito dvijAtimuKyarhavizeva pAvakaH' (rA0 5572) udIritaH prerita uddIptaH
